creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
This graphics card is the last one produced by S3 company, when it was already in bad financial emergency, short before they shut down.
This card was known for many problems, and it is very, very rare, sought for by retro hardware collectors.
See here: http://hw-museum.cz/vga/232/s3-savage-3d

As the practical relevance of supporting that exotic 1998 vintage AGP card is virtually zero, could this bug please be closed?
